mapper.insert: insert into views (visitor_id, page_path, referer,page_title, ip_address, user_agent, view_time) values (#{visitorId}, #{pagePath}, #{referer},#{pageTitle}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{viewTime})
mapper.select:
select * from views
and page_path like concat('%', #{pagePath}, '%')
and referer like concat('%', #{referer}, '%')
and visitor_id = #{visitorId}
order by view_time desc
select date(view_time) as date, count(*) as count from views where date(view_time) between #{begin} and #{end} group by date(view_time) order by date
mapper.delete:
delete from views where id in
#{id}
